headline: Is Constellation Brands (STZ) Undervalued After Earnings Exposed Growth And Margin Questions?
summary: Why Constellation Brands Stock Is Back in Focus After Earnings Constellation Brands (STZ) has moved back onto investors’ radar after first quarter earnings showed lower sales and revenue but higher net income and earnings per share, alongside cautious commentary on margins and segment trends. See our latest analysis for Constellation Brands. Constellation Brands’ recent earnings update and continued share repurchases come against a weaker price backdrop, with the share price down 12.31% over...

headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Anheuser-Busch, Diageo, Constellation Brands, Brown-Forman and Molson Coors Beverage
summary: BUD, DEO, STZ, BF.B and TAP are adapting to changing consumer preferences through innovation, premiumization and expanding low-alcohol offerings.
